sources.issuing_organisation: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.version: CDC Yellow Book: Health Information for International Travel, 2026 edition
sources.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
sources.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
sources.clinical_setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documenting traveler health background, itinerary, trip purpose, activities, prior travel, immunization and medicine context and individualized risk assessment; no vaccine, medicine, dose or advice is mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_sections.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

exact_sections.heading: Assess individual risk
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.

archive.title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
archive.publisher: United States Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
archive.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
archive.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_relevant_sections.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Assess individual risk
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.

sources.exact_document_title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
sources.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
sources.clinical_setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

exact_sections.heading: 5.8 Catch-Up Immunization for Children Aged 4 Months Through 6 Years
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

exact_sections.heading: 13. Recommendation Nine: Contraindications and Precautions
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

exact_sections.heading: 15. Recommendation Eleven: Vaccine Administration and Recording — consent, preparation, screening, and interview questions
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.

exact_sections.heading: 15.8 Patient Education
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.
